name: rails-dev-plugin
description: Rails development plugin with 11 specialized agents and 17 portable Skills. Agents are lean orchestrators that load domain-specific Skills for models, controllers, views, services, jobs, testing, architecture, DevOps, GraphQL, Hotwire, API design, mailers, authentication, caching, Ruby refactoring, and object-oriented design. Adapts recommendations to the project's stack profile (omakase, service-oriented, or api-first). Skills are independently usable and exportable to other platforms.
